_note: Overlaps with digital_identity.aws_secret_access_key. The credentials/ version is canonical for secret detection; digital_identity/ version retained for category-based policy inclusion.
name: AWS Secret Access Key
summary: Detects AWS Secret Access Keys (40-character base64 strings)
description: Detects AWS Secret Access Keys (40-character base64 strings). Exposure combined with Access Key ID grants full AWS account access.

effect.message: AWS Secret Access Key redacted - must never be exposed (critical security risk)
